entries.item: .t-* utility classes do not yet consume the --type-* role tokens (values duplicated in src/index.css)
entries.decision: F1 shipped tokens only to avoid behavioral risk; the .t-* refactor rides the F3 primitive ports where each class is re-verified
entries.upgradeTrigger: F3 net-new-primitives PR opens (the ports consume --type-* and prove the values)

entries.item: --brand-shadow-* call sites not yet migrated to canonical --shadow-*
entries.decision: Two shadow families coexist deliberately; deprecation direction documented in src/tokens.css comment (F1)
entries.upgradeTrigger: Phase Z consolidation closeout (per-surface retirement sweep)

entries.item: pr-check 'Non-standard transition duration' rule still allows the legacy 120/180/400ms literal set alongside var(--dur-*) — zero legacy call sites exist repo-wide (verified by adversarial review 2026-07-03), so the allowance + rule message should be retired to make motion tokens the sole standard
entries.decision: Motion tokens ratified as canonical (F2a). The legacy literal allowance is kept only so pre-rebuild code additions stay possible during the transition; this is a policy retirement, NOT a call-site migration (none exist)
entries.upgradeTrigger: Phase Z consolidation closeout — remove the legacy ALLOWED set from the rule and update its message so var(--dur-*) is the only standard

entries.item: The kit Toast visuals are not yet ported onto the existing src/components/Toast.tsx — F3 deliberately did NOT build a second Toast (HEAD's ToastProvider/useToast is the canonical mutation-feedback primitive, mounted in App.tsx with 15+ consumers). The kit Toast's look becomes a tokens-only restyle of the existing component (T1 carry-over-then-reskin).
entries.decision: Keep the existing Toast as the single mutation-feedback primitive; restyle its visuals to the kit spec later rather than forking a duplicate during F3 (adversarial review CP1).
entries.upgradeTrigger: Keywords pilot ships mutations (the first rebuilt surface that fires toasts) — restyle then so the new look lands with real usage.

entries.item: RebuiltSidebar footer utilities (NotificationBell, WorkspaceSelector, Revenue/Settings/theme/logout IconButtons) carry over from the legacy Sidebar; a fully DS-native restyle is deferred.
entries.decision: T1 carry-over — machinery-dense, zero capability loss; the visual seam is accepted for F4 so the pilot can validate the registry-driven shell first.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Phase A admin fan-out reaches the shell chrome.

entries.item: NAV_REGISTRY icons render as lucide via <Icon as>; FA-name mapping of registry entries is deferred.
entries.decision: D5 keeps <Icon as={LucideIcon}> during the incremental lucide-to-FA migration; remapping the registry icons now is out of F4 scope.
entries.upgradeTrigger: The lucide-to-FA call-site migration reaches navRegistry.

entries.item: ~381 files still import lucide-react directly (or use <Icon as={LucideIcon}>). The icon system of record is now Font Awesome Sharp Regular (<Icon name=...>); lucide is kept as a supported migration path but every surface should migrate to FA glyphs.
entries.decision: D5 reversed to Font Awesome Sharp Regular (owner, 2026-07-03). This foundation PR ships the font + Icon component + ICON_NAMES + gate flip; the 381-site migration is explicitly incremental (surface by surface, Keywords pilot first) to keep each PR reviewable rather than one big-bang rewrite.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Per-surface rebuild PRs migrate their lucide icons to <Icon name=...>; retire the lucide `as` path once the last surface is migrated.

entries.item: The self-hosted Font Awesome ships the FULL Pro CSS (fontawesome.min.css ~158KB) + the full Sharp Regular woff2 (~288KB, all glyphs) while the app uses only ~52 ICON_NAMES glyphs.
entries.decision: Ship the complete CSS + font now for correctness/simplicity (any glyph renders); gzip brings the CSS to ~30KB. Subsetting is a perf optimization, not correctness.
entries.upgradeTrigger: The bundle-budget ratchet flags Font Awesome as the active regression source, or the icon migration (DEF-icon-001) settles the final glyph set — then subset the woff2 (pyftsubset) + trim the CSS to the used glyphs.

entries.item: The rebuilt shell has no way to express focus mode — legacy Sidebar takes hidden/onExitHidden and collapses to a slim exit strip (App.tsx effectiveFocusMode, fires on the rewrite surface). RebuiltSidebar/AppShell omit it.
entries.decision: Not a pilot regression — focus mode only fires on Page Rewriter and the pilot is Keywords-only. Ledgered so it is closed before the rebuilt shell expands to cover the Page Rewriter surface (review PR #1478).
entries.upgradeTrigger: The rebuild reaches the Page Rewriter surface (Phase A) — add a hidden/collapsed shell state to AppShell + RebuiltSidebar before the shell replaces the legacy one there.

entries.item: The rebuilt breadcrumb/topbar drops the visible ⌘K search IconButton and the breadcrumb workspace-switcher dropdown that legacy Breadcrumbs render. The ⌘K keyboard shortcut still works (global listener) and workspace switching is covered by the sidebar selector — this is a secondary/discoverability affordance loss, not a capability loss.
entries.decision: Accepted for F4 (shortcut + sidebar switcher preserve the underlying capability). Re-add the visible top-bar search affordance before the rebuilt shell replaces the legacy one platform-wide (review PR #1478).
entries.upgradeTrigger: Phase A shell-expansion, or the first mouse-user report of the missing search button — add a ⌘K IconButton to the rebuilt Toolbar/breadcrumb.

entries.item: Inline list-row rank sparkline and 7-day delta pill from the mockup are deferred; the drawer sparkline remains because it uses the existing per-keyword history endpoint.
entries.decision: Avoid an N+1 history fetch in the pilot table. Ship the DS-native row without inline trend graphics until a batched history-by-keyword read model exists.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Add a batched rank-history read model for visible keyword rows, then render the row sparkline/delta through the DataTable cell without client-side data fabrication.

entries.item: Avg-position and period-over-period delta KPI variants are deferred; the pilot renders existing count and traffic-value tiles only.
entries.decision: Do not compute new summary rollups or deltas in the client. The KPI variants need a server-owned rollup/snapshot-diff contract before they can be trusted.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Server summary exposes average-position and comparison-period deltas with tests that define the date window and empty-state semantics.

entries.item: Retiring lint:ds-adherence (D-F2b-1) drops the only check that flagged raw-px literals in inline-style DS components. The F2a ds-* gates cover hex/palette/motion/icon purity but NOT raw pixel values, so raw-px in inline-style primitives is now unenforced.
entries.decision: The kit adherence config was redundant with the F2a ds-* gates plus TypeScript prop-checking for everything except raw-px. Rather than keep a whole lint pass alive for one signal, the raw-px gap is accepted now and re-addressed as a focused rule when inline-style primitives settle.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Phase Z consolidation closeout (or when inline-style DS primitives stabilize) — add a focused raw-px pr-check rule, or migrate inline px to the --space-* scale.

entries.item: RebuiltAppChrome/AppShell has no slot for the connection/health StatusBar (hasOpenAIKey/hasWebflowToken/connected/workspaceCount) the legacy shell renders — AppShell exposes sidebar/topbar/children but no footer. Review PR #1480 restored CommandPalette (⌘K) + AdminChat to the rebuilt mount (real capability losses), but StatusBar needs a shell footer slot.
entries.decision: Ship the rebuilt Keywords surface without the StatusBar footer for now — the RebuiltSidebar footer's NotificationBell already surfaces connection state, and adding an AppShell footer slot is a shell-primitive enhancement, not a Keywords-pilot bug. The two capability-loss items (⌘K, admin chat) were fixed in-PR; this display-affordance is ledgered.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Phase A shell-expansion (the rebuilt shell covers non-Keywords surfaces) — add a `footer` slot to AppShell + thread StatusBar through RebuiltAppChrome so every rebuilt surface shows connection/health state.

entries.item: The Pages/Clusters/Lifecycle grouped lenses group only the CURRENT PAGE of rows (pageSize <= 100), not the full workspace keyword set — so BoardColumn counts and group stats reflect page 1 while the lens tab shows the true total. Review PR #1480 made this HONEST (a truncation banner + removed the fabricated client-side averageRank) but full coverage needs server-side grouping.
entries.decision: Ship the grouped lenses over the current page WITH an explicit truncation banner (never present a page-1 board as the full universe) rather than fetch-all-client-side (unbounded) or block the pilot on a server grouping contract. averageRank removed per DEF-kw-002 (no client rollups).
entries.upgradeTrigger: A server-side grouped-view read model (group by page/cluster/lifecycleStage across ALL keywords with server-computed counts + rollups) — then the grouped lenses render complete groups without the page cap.

entries.item: hubSortToKccSort was extracted to the shared src/lib/keywordHubSort.ts (the rebuilt surface consumes it), but the legacy KeywordHub.tsx still keeps its own byte-identical copy + HubSortKey type. Two mappings can drift.
entries.decision: Do NOT touch the legacy KeywordHub during the pilot (a deliberate Task 8.4 constraint — it is the surface being replaced). The drift window is transient: KeywordHub is retired when ui-rebuild-shell covers Keywords, and the duplicate dies with it. Unifying now risks destabilizing legacy for no lasting benefit.
entries.upgradeTrigger: KeywordHub retirement (the rebuilt Keywords surface goes global / legacy branch removed) — delete the legacy hubSortToKccSort + HubSortKey and import from src/lib/keywordHubSort.

entries.item: The rebuilt surface fetches summary+rows as ONE initial-view query keyed on the full rowsQuery, so the summary (counts + topicClusters + cannibalization + computeOrganicTrafficValue) rebuilds on every sort/page/lens/filter change though it is invariant to sort/page; computeOrganicTrafficValue also re-SELECT*s page_keywords despite the lite sourceSnapshot already being in memory. A standalone summary hook keyed WITHOUT query already exists.
entries.decision: Efficiency, not correctness — the surface is right, just does redundant work per interaction. Deferred rather than rushed: decoupling the summary from rowsQuery + threading the snapshot into computeOrganicTrafficValueFromPages needs careful type alignment (lite vs full PageKeywordMap) and is a template pattern worth getting right, not fast.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Before Phase A fan-out leans on the initial-view pattern — split the summary into its own query keyed without sort/page (reuse the existing summary hook), and feed computeOrganicTrafficValueFromPages the in-memory sourceSnapshot.pageMap instead of re-reading page_keywords.

entries.item: Save-draft / publish spine — full-page Webflow write-back (SB-032) is not built; the rebuilt surface is export-only v1 (.docx/.pdf + push-to-draft-target).
entries.decision: AD-017 export-only parity v1; any new Webflow write path is a flagged, owner-signed follow-up. Rewrites export out rather than writing back to the CMS.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner signs off the seo-editor-write-targets contract + a dark-launch flag for CMS write-back.

entries.item: Rewrite-playbook writes (SB-031) deferred; v1 renders the playbook patterns as static read-only chips.
entries.decision: Playbook read may already be serialized (admin-workspace-view); write/edit of playbook patterns is out of export-only v1 scope.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Playbook editing prioritized on the roadmap.

entries.item: Server-persisted rewrite drafts (SB-030) deferred; the export-only v1 is in-memory and edits are lost on navigation.
entries.decision: No draft persistence exists in v1; export is the only durable handoff until the server draft write spine lands.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Any draft persistence is required, or the write spine (DEF-page-rewriter-001) lands.

entries.item: Competitor→insight graduation write is not built; the rebuilt surface renders existing insightId linkage only, it does not create/graduate insights.
entries.decision: AD-004 defers all 'graduate to Insights Engine' writes wholesale to the one C3-era owner-signed cross-surface contract; no surface builds an ad-hoc graduation write.
entries.upgradeTrigger: The C3 cross-surface insight-graduation contract lands.

entries.item: Insight/proof-point graduation bridge (search win → Insights Engine, SB-061/SB-001) not built; the surface renders wins but does not graduate them.
entries.decision: AD-004 defers all graduation writes wholesale to the one C3-era owner-signed cross-surface contract.
entries.upgradeTrigger: The C3 cross-surface insight-graduation contract lands.

entries.item: Cross-workspace GSC book roll-up (SB-013 / N1) not built; the surface is single-workspace.
entries.decision: Roll-up is a global-ops/cockpit concern scheduled with that wave, not a leaf-surface build.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Global-ops roll-up wave (W6).

entries.item: Compression graduation insight (CWV-move on a compress pass) is not built; the rebuilt surface ships compression parity without writing a graduation insight.
entries.decision: AD-004 defers all 'graduate to Insights Engine' writes wholesale to the one C3-era owner-signed cross-surface contract; no surface builds an ad-hoc graduation write (SB-023 could register through the SB-001 seam once it lands).
entries.upgradeTrigger: The C3 cross-surface insight-graduation contract lands (SB-023 / SB-001 seam).

entries.item: Server-side compression savings estimate (sharp dry-run) is not built; the surface ships a client-side ~55% heuristic labelled 'estimate' (no fabricated numbers).
entries.decision: Quick-win is the client heuristic computed from the already-fetched asset list; defer the server dry-run unless the heuristic is rejected as inaccurate.
entries.upgradeTrigger: The client 55% savings heuristic is rejected as inaccurate (SB-059).

entries.item: Asset dimensions (w×h) are omitted from cards/table until SB-022's background-derived field is populated; the list render never fires an N+1 per-asset dimension fetch.
entries.decision: The Webflow list-assets payload carries no original w×h; derive lazily/batched in the background and show dimensions only once the field is backfilled (probes.md Probe 1 / SB-022 at M).
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-022 background dimension-derivation lands and backfills the width/height field.

entries.item: 49-point geo-grid rank map is not built; the surface ships a posture grid on real per-market single-point data instead of a geo-grid scan.
entries.decision: AD-025: no data source exists and the geo-grid needs a new paid scan job + snapshot table + migration; ship the posture grid now and defer the scan.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner greenlights the paid geo-grid scan job (SB-057 / sn-local-presence-1).

entries.item: View-on-Google link is deferred; no review/maps URL is persisted so the surface cannot deep-link a reviewer to the live Google review.
entries.decision: SB-018-5 needs a DB-column + mapper + serialization lockstep to persist the maps URL; defer that column and ship review-response authoring without the outbound link.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-018-5 lands the maps-URL column + mapper + serialization (sn-local-presence-5).

entries.item: Reopen-for-edits on an approved review response is deferred; the approved→draft transition is illegal in the state machine today.
entries.decision: SB-018-7 needs state-machine sign-off (AD-024) to add the reopen transitions that clear approval metadata; ship the forward lifecycle now and defer reopen.
entries.upgradeTrigger: State-machine sign-off adds the approved→draft reopen transitions (SB-018-7 / sn-local-presence-7).

entries.item: Per-target nudge-client rate-limit is deferred; the existing remindDeliverable path has no per-target throttle so repeat nudges are not rate-limited on this surface.
entries.decision: SB-014's email/broadcast/activity halves already exist; only the net-new per-target throttle is missing and it did not ride W2, so ledger it rather than ship an ad-hoc throttle.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-014 per-target rate-limit ships (sn-local-presence-4 / N7).

entries.item: GBP Performance hero metrics (views/calls/directions) are cut; the surface shows rating + reviews + completeness instead of live performance metrics.
entries.decision: AD-025: SB-058 needs a new Google Performance OAuth scope + client method + storage that the GBP client does not have today; ship the available signals and defer the performance ingestion.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner greenlights the new Google Performance scope + ingestion (SB-058 / sn-local-presence-2).

entries.item: Profile-health checklist ships 3 real signals (photos/attributes/category); hours/products/Q&A/service-area signals are deferred.
entries.decision: Only photos/attributes/category are captured by GBP ingestion today; ship the 3-signal checklist and defer the extended-profile signals until ingestion covers them.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-056 extended GBP profile ingestion lands (hours/products/Q&A/service-area) (sn-local-presence-8).

entries.item: Per-asset in-place Compress action from Page Weight asset rows is not built; the surface ships the Asset Manager deep-link sender only.
entries.decision: Ship the Asset Manager deep-link sender only; defer in-place compression until the receiver and a per-asset action contract are proven.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Asset Manager exposes a verified asset-id/filter receiver plus a per-asset compression action contract.

entries.item: Per-opportunity Fix routing from the PageSpeed opportunities list is not built; the list renders with savings but no Fix buttons.
entries.decision: Render the opportunities list with savings now; defer Fix buttons because destination ownership is undefined.
entries.upgradeTrigger: A signed fix-target routing contract names the owning surface for each PageSpeed opportunity class.

entries.item: Lighthouse accessibility / best-practices / SEO category bars are not shown; only the performance score + full Core Web Vitals ship.
entries.decision: Defer the extra Lighthouse categories; ship the existing performance score and full Core Web Vitals parity first.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-024 fetches and persists extra Lighthouse categories on the PageSpeed snapshot shape.

entries.item: Automatic content-win graduation to the Insights Engine is not built; the surface renders verdicts but does not graduate them.
entries.decision: Defer the automatic insight write to the owner-signed C3 graduation seam; do not build an ad-hoc Performance-only endpoint.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-001 lands the shared graduation write contract (InsightType registration, broadcast, activity log, snapshot provenance).

entries.item: Engagement / impressions lift percent versus a pre-publish baseline is not shown; the server reads only one trailing 90-day window.
entries.decision: Do not fabricate lift percentages from the trailing 90-day read; defer until a real pre/post baseline derivation exists.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-008 adds pre/post-publish GA4 and GSC window reads and serializes the lift fields.

entries.item: Insert internal link directly into a Webflow source page
entries.decision: Ship copy-HTML/manual implementation parity now; defer direct insertion because it is a new Webflow write path under AD-017.
entries.upgradeTrigger: A signed seo-editor write-target contract adds a safe Webflow insert-internal-link path with preview, auth, activity log, and rollback semantics.

entries.item: Per-suggestion internal-link client sends
entries.decision: Keep the HEAD batched internal_link action plus optional note; defer per-suggestion sends because they change the Inbox payload contract.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner signs a new per-item client-action payload contract and the client Inbox renderer supports both batch and item-level review.

entries.item: Persisted reviewed or suppressed state for dead links
entries.decision: Ship Reviewed as session-state row feedback only; defer durable suppression until a Links-owned store and toggle endpoint exist.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-027 lands the reviewed/suppressed store, POST toggle endpoint, and link-check snapshot serialization.

entries.item: Background jobs and scheduled crawls for link, redirect, and internal-link scans
entries.decision: Keep manual synchronous GET scans for parity and honest freshness; defer job migration and recurring crawl scheduling.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-045 moves the three scans to the background-job platform and, if scheduled crawl is adopted, registers the cron with the registry census test.

entries.item: Direct Webflow redirect-create action from Dead Links or Redirects
entries.decision: Ship export, copy, send-to-client, and pre-stage flows; defer direct Webflow redirect creation because the server route is missing and write paths require AD-017 treatment.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-026 adds the redirect-create endpoint and the Links surface has an owner-signed write UX with activity logging and failure states.

entries.item: Links-to-Insights Engine graduation bridge
entries.decision: Do not build a Links-only insight write; defer graduation to the C3 owner-signed cross-surface seam required by AD-004.
entries.upgradeTrigger: The C3 graduation contract explicitly includes Links signals and defines InsightType registration, broadcast, activity log, and source provenance.

entries.item: Architecture gap Add-page CTA
entries.decision: Relocate the existing Architecture view now; defer the prototype-only Add-page CTA until a destination and write contract are signed.
entries.upgradeTrigger: A Content Pipeline or strategy-planning receiver is named for creating planned pages from architecture gaps, including route params and ownership.

entries.item: Missing-schema Site Audit count omitted from the Schema summary strip until the audit check taxonomy and projection are fixed.
entries.decision: Ship the summary strip with an honest absent state for this one stat; do not derive from mismatched client-only check ids.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-011 defines or remaps the schema audit finding producer and serializes a per-workspace missing-schema count.

entries.item: Automatic schema-win graduation to Insights Engine after schema deploys prove a rich result or AI citation.
entries.decision: Defer the insight write to the owner-signed C3 graduation seam; this rebuild carries impact display only.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-001 lands the shared graduation write contract with InsightType registration, broadcast, activity log, and snapshot provenance.

entries.item: Rich-result and AI-citation detection source for schema outcome scoring and graduation.
entries.decision: Do not add client-side detection or scrape logic in the rebuilt surface; wait for the server outcome-measurement provider.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-021 adds the detection provider that can set rich_result_appearing true for schema_deployed outcomes.

entries.item: Shared Site Audit category score omitted from Schema until SB-010 provides the Site Audit-owned projection.
entries.decision: Do not invent a Schema-local audit scorer; consume the shared category score only after the Site Audit backlog item lands.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-010 ships per-category audit scoring with the six-category taxonomy and exposes the schema category score for consumers.

entries.item: Schema Site Plan first-class redesign deferred while SchemaPlanPanel is bridge-mounted as T1 carry-over.
entries.decision: Mount the existing plan machinery inside the rebuilt surface now; defer a full DS-native plan redesign until after parity is proven.
entries.upgradeTrigger: A follow-up design spec replaces the bridge with a DS-native plan sub-view without changing plan lifecycle semantics.

entries.item: Orphaned SchemaHealthDashboard and legacy SchemaReviewTab/Modal cleanup deferred outside the admin rebuild surface.
entries.decision: Do not port or resurrect the orphaned client/schema-review surfaces in W3; leave cleanup to the AD-030 dead-code pass.
entries.upgradeTrigger: AD-030 cleanup pass is scheduled and can safely delete or retire orphaned schema client/review files with route tests.

entries.item: Reload-durable Sent publication tag derived from approvals rather than session-only sent state.
entries.decision: Render session-backed sent feedback now; defer a durable Sent tag until the approvals-derived read is verified and tested.
entries.upgradeTrigger: A schema approvals read joins open/recent schema batches to page rows and survives reload without changing deliverable shapes.

entries.item: Numeric brand-context completeness score for the Brand AI overview cockpit
entries.decision: ODP-BRAND-V1: omit inferred overall scoring and readiness; use truthful configured-count and per-group evidence until SB-033 exposes a trusted server-backed score.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-033 adds brand-scoped sources to server/ai-context-check.ts and exposes tested per-group scores.

entries.item: Founder interview Q&A store and AI draft-from-docs endpoint
entries.decision: Defer the interview flow; ship Discovery with existing source ingestion and extraction review only.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-034 opens with a migration, AI operation contract, and Discovery flow design.

entries.item: Source-fed knowledge-base regeneration from Discovery sources and extractions
entries.decision: Keep the existing website-crawl knowledge-base job; defer source-fed regeneration until SB-035.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-035 adds a background-job variant that reads discovery sources/extractions.

entries.item: PDF DOCX and XLSX discovery-source upload parsing
entries.decision: Keep .txt and .md only in Wave 3 because the server rejects other types and has no binary parser.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-036 adds parser dependencies, upload validation, fixtures, and extraction tests.

entries.item: Single-deliverable brand identity export from generator modal
entries.decision: Keep Export All approved deliverables; defer per-item export endpoint and modal action.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-037 adds an item-scoped export route or type parameter with tests.

entries.item: Brand-docs upload UI placement for the existing headless ingestion API
entries.decision: Do not invent placement without owner sign-off; preserve the API and folder hints until Q9 is resolved.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner resolves Q9 by choosing Discovery dropzone home or intentionally API-only documentation.

entries.item: GeneratedPost engagement readbacks and per-post time-series cards
entries.decision: Defer deeper GeneratedPost metrics beyond the shared Content Performance read path.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-007 lands engagement and time-series readback fields for GeneratedPost rows.

entries.item: Pre-post baseline lift for published content performance
entries.decision: Use current trailing-window metrics for W4 and defer baseline lift modeling.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-008 provides baseline lift calculations and fixture-backed read tests.

entries.item: Graduate qualifying published wins into the Insights Engine
entries.decision: Keep graduation out of the W4 critical path per AD-004.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner confirms win criteria and SB-001 ships a tested graduation endpoint.

entries.item: Client nudge and reminder actions for awaiting client review
entries.decision: Preserve current request actions and defer rate-limited nudges.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-014 defines reminder cooldowns, activity logging, and broadcast behavior.

entries.item: Approved recommendation progress join for public/client surfaces
entries.decision: Do not block the admin rebuild on the cross-surface recommendation join.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-016 ships the recommendation progress join with public read-path coverage.

entries.item: CMS draft and publish writeback from the rebuilt draft workspace
entries.decision: Preserve current export and publish controls until write-target rules are owner-approved.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-032 lands Webflow writeback with route tests and write-target documentation.

entries.item: Persisted lifecycleStage model for content pipeline items
entries.decision: Use AD-012 derived stage labels in W4 and defer a schema-backed model.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-046 proves derived stages are insufficient and ships a migration plus mappers.

entries.item: Generate briefs for selected matrix cells as a bulk job
entries.decision: Keep existing planner actions and defer the currently non-live bulk job.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-048 implements the matrix bulk brief job with background-task tracking.

entries.item: Per-field AI assists inside the brief editing workflow
entries.decision: Preserve current brief field editing and defer granular assist controls.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-049 ships per-field operations, 429 copy, and schema-validated outputs.

entries.item: Client questionnaire intake flow for content requests
entries.decision: Keep the current request lifecycle and defer questionnaire intake.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-050 ships questionnaire persistence, client/admin read paths, and tests.

entries.item: Page content-perf is not yet retired to content-pipeline?tab=published; the legacy content-perf route still mounts alongside the rebuilt Published tab.
entries.decision: Ship the rebuilt content-pipeline surface (with the Published tab) additively behind ui-rebuild-shell first; defer the content-perf route-removal (routes.ts / App.tsx / navRegistry / D8 / contract tests) to a focused follow-up so the multi-site retirement is verified on its own. Flag-OFF, content-perf remains the sole live home, so there is no user-facing double-home. HELD (owner, 2026-07-07): the ?tab=published redirect target only resolves flag-ON — the LEGACY ContentPipeline (rendered while ui-rebuild-shell is OFF, its prod default) has tabs planner/calendar/briefs/posts/publish and NO 'published' tab, so a content-pipeline?tab=published redirect falls back to Briefs flag-OFF and silently drops the ContentPerformance surface. Removing Page content-perf now would therefore regress the current production (flag-OFF) experience.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Execute the route-removal checklist (routes.ts / App.tsx redirect / navRegistry / D8 / nav+deep-link contract tests) for Page content-perf → content-pipeline?tab=published only once the redirect target resolves in the SHIPPING flag state — i.e. do it as the last step right before ui-rebuild-shell flips on for content, OR fold the existing ContentPerformance component into the legacy ContentPipeline as a 'Published' tab in the same PR so both flag states honor ?tab=published with zero regression.

entries.item: Noindex quick-filter chip and per-row indexability status
entries.decision: Drop the Noindex chip in W4 instead of deriving indexability in the client; add it after SB-028 serializes an audit/crawl-backed field.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-028 lands per-page index/noindex status on the all-pages row payload.

entries.item: H1 and URL slug editing with automatic redirect
entries.decision: Render H1 and slug as read-only/reference in W4; writable controls wait for SB-029 plus the redirect-create prerequisite in SB-026.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-029 and SB-026 land behind an owner-approved Webflow write-path rollout.

entries.item: Server-persisted per-page SEO drafts
entries.decision: Carry localStorage/session drafts and the existing server suggestions panel in W4; defer the seo_drafts table and endpoints to SB-030.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-030 adds the seo_drafts table and route contract for durable per-page draft storage.

entries.item: Manual-row Add Redirect CTA and redirect-create write path
entries.decision: Keep manual sitemap-only rows read-only in W4; defer direct redirect creation because the Webflow redirect-create server route is missing.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-026 lands a backed redirect-create endpoint and the D3 manual-row handoff copy is approved.

entries.item: Direct target-keyword assignment from SEO Editor
entries.decision: Show joined target keywords and deep-link to Keyword Hub; do not add a second keyword writer in the W4 SEO Editor rebuild.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner signs a shared-writer keyword mutation contract or Keyword Hub exposes an explicit assignment deep-link API.

entries.item: Full keyboard review queue with admin approve/request triage
entries.decision: Ship seven-state visibility and Send/Publish/Skip only; reject admin Approve in W4 so client approval states remain authoritative.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner signs a state-machine change that allows admin triage without corrupting client approval semantics.

entries.item: SEO publish graduation note into Insights Engine
entries.decision: Do not build a SEO Editor-only graduation note or insight write; defer the narrative to AD-004's shared C3 graduation seam.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-001 or its C3 successor defines the shared insight-graduation write contract for SEO publish signals.

entries.item: AeoReview / AI Search Ready relocation to AI Visibility
entries.decision: Keep AeoReview reachable inside Site Audit until an ai-visibility Page id and receiver exist; do not drop or retarget the sub-tool in W5.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner creates the AI Visibility route/home and signs the AeoReview relocation contract, including D8 redirect and receiver tests.

entries.item: sitehealth.js cross-client roll-up and batch-fix
entries.decision: Defer the book-level site-health matrix and all cross-client batch-fix behavior to W6 Global Ops; W5 does not ship even the read-only matrix.
entries.upgradeTrigger: W6 Global Ops signs the cross-client read/write safety review and implements SB-013/SB-060 with performance and activity-log coverage.

entries.item: Audit findings graduation to Insights Engine
entries.decision: Do not build a Site Audit-only graduation write; keep audit parity and wait for the C3 owner-signed cross-surface graduation seam.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-001 lands a shared graduation endpoint with InsightType registration, source provenance, activity logging, broadcasts, and receiver UI.

entries.item: Monetization to-pitch admin stream
entries.decision: Do not invent an admin upsell or scope-expansion queue in the Cockpit rebuild; ship opt/send/unclassified streams on the shared work-queue source and show honest absence for money-stream pitch work until SB-041 lands.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-041 ships a server-authored admin pitch queue with source provenance, counts shared with Global Ops Today, activity/audit coverage, and tests proving client purchase upsells are not reused as admin pitch items.

entries.item: Promote client request to strategy signal
entries.decision: Do not build a Cockpit-only promote-to-signal POST; keep client requests as queue rows and route operators to the owning surface until the shared flagged flow is signed.
entries.upgradeTrigger: AD-023 follow-up lands SB-002 with one shared endpoint, request status transition, provenance snapshot, activity log, broadcast, and coordinated receivers across Cockpit, Global Ops, Engine, Insights, and Recommendations.

entries.item: Technicals graduate to proof point or Insights Engine
entries.decision: Do not build a Cockpit-specific graduation/proof-point write from technical rows; keep technicals as hand-off evidence and wait for the C3 owner-signed graduation contract.
entries.upgradeTrigger: AD-004/SB-001 or SB-061 lands a shared graduation/proof-point contract with typed source provenance, attribution honesty, activity logging, broadcasts, and receiver UI.

entries.item: Client-switcher book roll-up
entries.decision: Do not extend the global workspace switcher from the single-client Cockpit lane; leave at-risk/open-request/in-setup roll-ups to Global Ops or shell ownership.
entries.upgradeTrigger: The shell/global-ops owner extends the existing /api/workspace-overview aggregation with typed roll-up fields and proves the switcher, Global Ops Today, and Cockpit read any shared counts from one source.

entries.item: strategy-command-center retirement and strategy-the-issue no-touch guard
entries.decision: Build the rebuilt seo-strategy surface additively behind ui-rebuild-shell. Defer destructive strategy-command-center retirement to an owner-gated follow-up and do not touch the client strategy-the-issue flag.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner approves a separate flag-retirement PR with OFF-branch deletion, override cleanup migration, and strategy-the-issue lifecycle audit.

entries.item: Graduation writes from Engine
entries.decision: Defer graduation writes wholesale per AD-004; Engine ships parity/read-only curation behavior and does not add bridge writes or status mutations.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Graduation seam is approved as a shared contract with tests and cross-surface write ownership.

entries.item: Promote client request to strategy signal/backing move
entries.decision: Defer E-Q9 and AD-023 promote-to-signal path; keep existing feedback-approve and manual recommendation flows in this ticket.
entries.upgradeTrigger: A flagged, contract-backed promote-to-signal follow-up defines source snapshots, attribution, events, tests, and inbox/request ownership.

entries.item: Admin what-the-client-sees spine preview
entries.decision: Defer SB-039/E9 preview spine; Engine v1 does not add a client preview without a read-safe admin source.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Owner approves the admin preview contract and read path, including public-boundary parity tests and no-client-claim copy review.

entries.item: Per-workspace timezone and locale preferences
entries.decision: Defer timezone/locale fields; rebuild preserves existing report cadence and send-now controls only.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-044 lands workspace timezone/locale fields with report-rendering and client timestamp tests.

entries.item: Diagnostics stage-as-backing-move and report export
entries.decision: Defer on-demand diagnostic remediation staging and export projection; W6 keeps read-only diagnostics list/detail.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-042 ships an on-demand stage endpoint, export projection, activity logging, and recommendation write contract.

entries.item: Promote client request to strategy signal/backing move
entries.decision: Adopt as product direction but defer the write path to the AD-023 cross-surface flagged contract; no ad-hoc Global Ops endpoint ships in W6.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-002/AD-023 lands a shared flagged flow with typed source provenance, request status transition, activity log, broadcast, and Insights/Recommendations receiver contract.

entries.item: Client onboarding questionnaire and welcome wizard re-skin
entries.decision: Global Ops preserves admin enable/reset and setup-state controls; client questionnaire/wizard rehome stays in the D4 C-phase.
entries.upgradeTrigger: D4 C2 client-portal re-skin owns the questionnaire/wizard with Brand Engine data-flow tests.

entries.item: Remove old Strategy Settings home after relocation
entries.decision: Relocate strategy inputs into Workspace Settings now, but do not remove StrategySettings from the Strategy surface until that owner confirms the single-source cut.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Strategy surface owner signs the removal, D8/receiver notes are added, and duplicate edit UI tests prove only Workspace Settings writes competitor/strategy inputs.

entries.item: Final LLMs.txt relocation from Workspace Settings to AI Visibility
entries.decision: Keep the existing Workspace Settings llms-txt tab reachable until AI Visibility has a real Page/receiver; do not drop the generator in W6.
entries.upgradeTrigger: AI Visibility ships a verified receiver and D8 row for llms-txt with runtime deep-link coverage.

entries.item: Destructive route deletion for Business-family Page ids
entries.decision: W6 ships additive Business redirects/aliases only; Page ids revenue, ai-usage, features, and prospect remain in the Page union until a separate route-removal-checklist PR.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Business consolidation soaks on staging, all senders target the Business receiver, and a dedicated route-removal PR follows docs/rules/route-removal-checklist.md.

entries.item: Cross-client site-health batch-fix background job
entries.decision: Consume the SB-013 read-only issue matrix only; defer cross-client batch-fix writes to a later background-job contract.
entries.upgradeTrigger: SB-060 lands a write-safety review, background job worker, activity logging, per-workspace broadcast behavior, and rollback/partial-failure tests.

entries.item: Rehome per-workspace Outcomes dashboard into Insights Engine
entries.decision: Keep Page outcomes and OutcomeDashboard as the per-workspace drill-in from the Outcomes book until an Insights Engine rehome is specified.
entries.upgradeTrigger: Insights Engine owner defines the per-workspace outcomes home, D8/deep-link map, and receiver tests; then Page outcomes can be retired or redirected.
